title: OpenPersona Social Contacts
description: Runtime contact book for a persona — local relationship metadata plus cached ACN fields. ACN is the SoT for endpoint/skills/agent_card; contacts.json caches those and adds trust_level, tags, notes, source, and interaction history. Updated by 'openpersona social' CLI commands.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version for lazy migration. Current: '1.0.0'.

endpoint.description: A2A endpoint URL (cached from ACN; refreshed by sync)

subnet_ids.description: Subnets the agent belongs to (cached from ACN)

agent_card_url.description: URL to the agent's A2A Agent Card on ACN

trust_level.description: Trust level. verified=on-chain verified or manually reviewed; community=has ACN history; unverified=unknown/first-seen

source.description: How this contact was added: manual (CLI add --manual), acn-sync (social sync), auto-discover (acn-register hook), inbox (from incoming a2a_inbox)

first_seen.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this contact was first added

last_seen.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of last known interaction

last_synced.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of last successful ACN sync. null = sync failed or never attempted

interaction_count.description: Total number of A2A messages sent to this contact
